sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n755" key="a)go/mfios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγόμφιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without grinders</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. αἰών</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">toothless</tr_> age, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.</author> </bibl> Com. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
